## Summary

Describe the user-visible problem and the focused change.

## Verification

- [ ] Focused tests
- [ ] Full `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run build:production`
- [ ] `bun run verify:metadata`
- [ ] VSIX package and strict inspection when release inputs change
- [ ] Manual installed-editor check for clickable or visual behavior

## Public-data review

- [ ] No private content, credentials, personal paths, proprietary assets, runtime mock data, or source maps
- [ ] Changed export files have reviewed current entries in `docs/provenance.json`
